name: semantic-data-tables
description: Bundled frontend assets for the SemanticDataTables MediaWiki extension

scripts.check: node --check tools/build-vendor.js && node --check resources/ext.semanticDataTables.js && node --check resources/vendor/datatables/dataTables.min.js && node --check resources/vendor/datatables/dataTables.dataTables.min.js && node --check resources/vendor/datatables/dataTables.dateTime.min.js && node --check resources/vendor/datatables/dataTables.buttons.min.js && node --check resources/vendor/datatables/buttons.dataTables.min.js && node --check resources/vendor/datatables/buttons.html5.min.js && node --check resources/vendor/datatables/buttons.print.min.js && node --check resources/vendor/datatables/buttons.colVis.min.js && node --check resources/vendor/datatables/dataTables.responsive.min.js && node --check resources/vendor/datatables/responsive.dataTables.min.js && node --check resources/vendor/datatables/dataTables.searchBuilder.min.js && node --check resources/vendor/datatables/searchBuilder.dataTables.min.js
